title: Marbella Catamaran Hire Birthday: Costs, Routes and Tips for 2026
html:
Planning a catamaran hire birthday in Marbella lets you celebrate on the Mediterranean's clearest waters. Depart from Puerto Banús and expect to pay from €3,500 for a full-day catamaran charter with a skipper, crew and catering for up to 12 guests. BoatHire24 compares options so you can book with confidence.

Where to set off in Marbella?

Marbella has several well-equipped marinas and bays perfect for starting your birthday charter. Puerto Banús is the most famous, with designer boutiques and a lively atmosphere. Other launch points include Marina La Bajadilla (near the old town), the Cabopino Marina (with its sandy dune reserve), and simply launching from the Playa de la Fontanilla shore for smaller craft. For a longer trip, head to the coastal towns of Fuengirola or Estepona, each around 20 minutes by boat. You can boat rental Marbella for your chosen dates.

Which boat to rent for a birthday party in Marbella?

The best choice depends on group size and how much time you want on the water. Consider these popular options:

  1. Catamaran (12, 16 guests), stable, spacious deck for lounging and dining. Full-day hire from €3,500, ideal for a party atmosphere.
  2. Motor yacht (8, 12 guests), faster and more luxurious, e.g. the Azimut 58 with flybridge and cabins. Browse the Azimut 58 listing for details; half-day from €2,200.
  3. Sailboat (6, 8 guests), more hands-on and eco-friendly, with a classic feel. Full-day from €1,800.
  4. RIB or speedboat (6, 8 guests), perfect for watersports and pulling a doughnut ring. Half-day from €600.
  5. Small motorboat (4, 6 guests), no licence required for some models, good for a short sunset cruise. Two hours from €300.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Marbella for a birthday?

Prices vary by boat type, duration and season, but expect to pay between €300 and €5,500 for a half-day to full-day charter. Below is a typical price-band breakdown: One option worth a look is the Azimut 58 listing.

  • Shared sunset tour per person: €70, €120
  • Small motorboat half-day (self-drive): €350, €600
  • Catamaran full-day with crew and catering (12 guests): €3,500, €5,500
  • Luxury crewed yacht full-day (up to 12 guests): €4,000, €7,000

Always check what is included: fuel, skipper, food and drinks. For catamarans, the birthday package often includes decoration and a cake. For more options and to compare verified boat listings, visit the boat rental Marbella page on BoatHire24.

Season and licence information for Marbella boat hire

Peak season runs from June to September, when the famous Poniente wind is gentler but the Levante wind can pick up in the afternoon. If you want calmer seas, book a morning departure. Licence requirements depend on engine power and distance from shore; in Spain a PNB (Basic Navigation Licence) is needed for powerboats over 5 knots, but many charter companies include a skipper who holds the necessary qualifications. The operator confirms exact requirements when you book, so you do not need to provide your own licence if you charter a crewed boat.

Local tip: For your birthday party, ask the charter company to anchor in the Ensenada de Cabopino, a quiet cove with turquoise water and fewer crowds than Puerto Banús. The beach there is beautiful and the water is calm for swimming.

At a glance

  • Price band: €300 to €7,000 per day
  • Peak months: June, July, August, September
  • Trip length: half-day (4 hours) or full-day (8 hours)
  • Capacity: 4 to 16 guests depending on boat
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can I bring my own food and drink on a catamaran charter?

Most operators allow you to bring your own food and drink, though many offer catering packages; check with the company beforehand.

Is it possible to swim and snorkel during the trip?

Yes, almost every charter includes stops for swimming and snorkelling at designated coves such as Cala de Marbella or the waters off Cabopino.

What happens if the weather is bad on the day of my birthday hire?

Charter companies typically offer a full refund or reschedule if the forecast shows unsafe sea conditions, so you are protected.

Do I need to pay a deposit when booking a boat in Marbella?

Yes, a deposit of 20, 30% is usually required to secure the date, with the balance due a few weeks before departure.

Planning a catamaran hire birthday in Marbella is straightforward when you use a trusted platform. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Marbella or list your own.
